name: National Archives Catalog API
notes: Requires NARA_API_KEY set as a Cloudflare Pages secret. Do not expose the API key in browser JavaScript. Do not scrape or bulk-download the Catalog through the live API.

name: Library of Congress JSON/YAML API
notes: No API key required for normal JSON/YAML lookups. Rate limits and responsible use still apply.

name: Oklahoma Historical Society Dawes Rolls Search
notes: Official state research page. Use linkout/search path unless permission or an official API is available.

name: BIA Branch of Land Titles and Records / LTRO
notes: Authority source for trust and restricted land title records. Not treated as a public bulk API.

name: BLM General Land Office Records
notes: Useful for patents and PLSS context, especially surrounding title and survey history.

name: National Archives Catalog AWS Bulk Dataset
notes: Use this for large-scale metadata processing instead of scraping the live NARA API.
